adventure: Your character finds a map hidden inside a book at a second-hand shop.
A bridge your character needs to cross has been destroyed overnight.
Your character is dared to explore a place everyone else avoids.
A stranger offers your character a ride, but they're heading in the wrong direction.
Your character wakes up on a boat with no memory of how they got there.
The trail your character has been following suddenly splits into three paths.
Your character discovers a hidden door behind a waterfall.
A storm forces your character to shelter in an abandoned building.
Your character finds footprints that shouldn't exist where they are.
The compass your character relies on starts pointing in the wrong direction.
Your character receives a letter with coordinates and a single word: hurry.
A landslide blocks the only way home.
Your character discovers their guide has been leading them in circles.
Something valuable has been stolen, and the thief left a trail.
Your character must cross hostile territory before nightfall.
An old friend appears in the last place your character expected.
Your character finds evidence that someone else has been where no one should have been.
The vehicle your character is travelling in breaks down in the middle of nowhere.
Your character is offered a job that sounds too good to be true.
A locked chest washes ashore near your character.
character: Does your character have any siblings?
Does your character have hair, and if so, what colour is it?
How does your character prefer to communicate?
How many limbs does your character have?
How old is your character?
How tall is your character?
What colour are your character's eyes?
What colour is your character's skin or other outer protective layer?
What's your character's favourite colour?
What's your character's favourite food?
What does your character do when they can't sleep?
What is your character's most treasured possession?
What is the first thing your character notices about other people?
What secret is your character keeping from everyone?
How does your character react when they're wrong about something?
What does your character's handwriting look like?
What skill does your character wish they had?
What does your character's living space say about them?
How does your character handle being alone?
What would your character refuse to do, no matter the reward?
children: A child discovers their stuffed animal has been on adventures while they were at school.
The new kid at school speaks a language nobody has ever heard before.
A tree in the garden starts growing something that isn't fruit.
Your character finds a door at the back of their wardrobe that wasn't there yesterday.
A lost pet finds its way home after an impossibly long journey.
Your character discovers they can understand what animals are saying.
The class pet escapes and the whole school goes on a hunt.
A rainy day turns into the best day ever when your character finds a puddle that leads somewhere else.
Your character receives a birthday present from someone they've never met.
The drawings in your character's sketchbook start coming to life.
A group of friends build a den and discover someone else has already been using it.
Your character's grandparent tells them a story that turns out to be true.
A snow day leads to the discovery of something buried in the garden.
Your character's shadow starts doing things on its own.
The school librarian has a secret room behind the bookshelves.
Your character swaps places with their best friend for a day.
A message in a bottle arrives with a request for help.
Your character finds out their teacher used to be an explorer.
A kite gets caught in a tree and your character climbs up to find a whole world in the branches.
Your character discovers a recipe that makes food taste like anything you want.
comedy: Your character accidentally sends a very personal message to their entire workplace.
A character tries to impress someone and everything goes spectacularly wrong.
Your character gets stuck in a piece of furniture and someone important arrives.
Two characters discover they've been lying to each other about the same thing.
Your character agrees to do something they have absolutely no idea how to do.
A misheard conversation leads to an increasingly absurd series of events.
Your character tries to cook a fancy meal and sets off every alarm in the building.
A pet does something embarrassing at the worst possible moment.
Your character shows up to an event in completely the wrong outfit.
Two strangers keep running into each other all day in increasingly unlikely places.
Your character has to give a speech and their notes are in the wrong order.
A character confidently gives directions that are completely wrong.
Your character tries to assemble furniture without the instructions.
A surprise party goes wrong because the wrong person walks in first.
Your character discovers their phone has been autocorrecting their messages into something horrifying.
A character tries to sneak out of a building and keeps getting spotted.
Your character accidentally adopts a pet they didn't want.
Two characters try to out-polite each other until it becomes absurd.
Your character wins a competition they didn't enter.
A character's attempt to fix a small problem creates a much bigger one.
contemporary: Your character gets a notification that changes the course of their day.
A neighbour your character has never spoken to leaves a note on their door.
Your character quits their job on impulse and immediately regrets it.
Two old friends meet by chance after years of silence.
Your character finds a journal left behind on public transport.
A power cut forces everyone in an apartment building to actually talk to each other.
Your character is passed over for a promotion they were promised.
A social media post goes viral and your character's life is turned upside down.
Your character moves to a new city where they know no one.
A family dinner reveals a secret that changes how your character sees their parents.
Your character's daily routine is disrupted by a stranger who keeps appearing.
A character has to decide between what they want and what someone they love needs.
Your character inherits something unexpected from a relative they barely knew.
A first date goes nothing like either person expected.
Your character discovers their best friend has been struggling in silence.
A cancelled flight forces two strangers to share a long car journey.
Your character receives a letter that was lost in the post for ten years.
A small act of kindness from a stranger changes your character's perspective.
Your character has to go back to a place they swore they'd never return to.
Two people on opposite sides of an argument realise they want the same thing.
fantasy: Your character discovers they can see things that are invisible to everyone else.
A spell goes wrong in an unexpected but not entirely unpleasant way.
Your character is chosen for something they are clearly unqualified for.
The last dragon is dying and only your character knows why.
A magical object chooses your character, but nobody can figure out what it does.
Your character wakes up with a mark on their skin that wasn't there before.
The seasons have stopped changing and no one knows why.
A character makes a deal with a creature who speaks in riddles.
Your character inherits a castle with a locked room that no key can open.
Two kingdoms on the brink of war depend on your character's next decision.
A familiar speaks for the first time and says something unsettling.
Your character finds a book that writes itself as they read it.
Magic is fading from the world and your character is the only one who notices.
A portal opens in an inconvenient location.
Your character is cursed to tell the truth for one full day.
The forest your character enters is not the same forest from the other side.
A prophecy names your character, but gets the details embarrassingly wrong.
Your character discovers their mentor has been hiding something for decades.
A mythical creature appears in a place where it absolutely should not be.
Your character must barter something precious for safe passage.
folk: A traveller asks for shelter and offers a story in return.
Your character breaks a rule that has been followed for generations.
Something that was buried long ago is uncovered by a storm.
Your character meets someone at a crossroads who offers a bargain.
A village tradition turns out to have a very real purpose no one remembers.
Your character is warned never to go somewhere, but hears a voice calling from that direction.
An animal leads your character to something they were never meant to find.
A song that everyone knows turns out to contain a hidden message.
Your character must complete three tasks to earn what they need.
The river changes course overnight and the old stories say it means something.
A midwinter festival reveals that an old superstition is true.
Your character is the seventh child and it matters more than they thought.
A stranger arrives in town who looks exactly like someone who died years ago.
Your character plants a seed given to them by a stranger and something impossible grows.
An old well in the centre of town starts making sounds at night.
Your character finds a coin that always comes back no matter how many times they spend it.
The harvest fails and the elders say it's because a promise was broken.
Your character follows a light through the woods that no one else can see.
A wedding is interrupted by an uninvited guest with a claim no one can deny.
Your character discovers that a bedtime story their grandmother told them is a warning.
historical: Your character intercepts a letter not meant for them during wartime.
A servant overhears a conversation that could change the course of history.
Your character is tasked with delivering a message across enemy territory.
A new invention arrives in town and divides the community.
Your character must choose between loyalty to their family and loyalty to their cause.
A fire destroys records that someone wanted kept secret.
Your character arrives in a new country with nothing but a name and an address.
A character from a powerful family falls in love with someone they shouldn't.
Your character discovers that a celebrated figure is not who they claim to be.
A drought forces your character's community to make impossible choices.
Your character is accused of a crime they didn't commit and no one will listen.
A ship arrives carrying something that will change your character's world forever.
Your character takes on a new identity to survive.
A long-standing treaty is about to collapse and your character is caught in the middle.
Your character finds a hidden room in an old building that tells a forgotten story.
A plague reaches your character's town and they must decide who to help first.
Your character witnesses an event that history will remember differently.
An arranged marriage brings two feuding families into uncomfortable proximity.
Your character smuggles something dangerous across a border.
A revolution begins and your character isn't sure which side they're on.
horror: Your character notices their reflection is a fraction of a second behind.
A door in your character's home opens to a room that shouldn't exist.
Your character receives a phone call from their own number.
The new house is perfect except for the scratching sound that comes from inside the walls.
Your character wakes up and everyone they know insists they've been gone for months.
A photograph your character took shows something standing behind them that wasn't there.
Your character's child starts talking about a friend no one else can see.
The power goes out and when it comes back, something in the room has moved.
Your character finds their own name carved into a headstone with tomorrow's date.
A noise wakes your character at 3am every night and it's getting closer.
Your character starts receiving letters from someone who died years ago.
The dog won't go into one room of the house and has started growling at the corner.
Your character notices that the shadows in their house don't match the objects casting them.
An old recording is found that captures a voice that shouldn't be there.
Your character moves into a new flat and the previous tenant left a journal with a warning.
Something is wrong with the mirrors but your character can't explain what.
Your character finds a tooth in the wall of their new home during renovation.
The neighbours insist that the house your character just bought has been empty for decades.
Your character wakes up covered in dirt with no memory of the night before.
A familiar lullaby is coming from somewhere inside the house but your character lives alone.
literary: Your character realises they have become the person they swore they'd never be.
A small, meaningless object triggers a memory your character has been avoiding.
Two people who once loved each other meet at a funeral.
Your character drives past the town they grew up in but doesn't stop.
A character tries to forgive someone and discovers they can't.
Your character sits in a waiting room and starts a conversation that changes everything.
A lie told years ago resurfaces at the worst possible moment.
Your character watches their child make the same mistake they once made.
Two siblings go through their late parent's belongings and discover something neither expected.
Your character writes a letter they know they'll never send.
A character returns to their childhood home and finds it smaller than they remember.
Your character keeps a ritual that no longer has meaning but they can't stop.
A long silence between two people finally breaks.
Your character overhears someone describing them to a stranger.
A character's carefully maintained image cracks in front of the one person who matters.
Your character makes a decision that is right but feels entirely wrong.
Two old friends have lunch and talk about everything except the one thing that matters.
Your character finds a list of goals they wrote ten years ago.
A character realises that the person they've been angry with is actually afraid.
Your character sits alone after everyone has left and considers what just happened.
lgbtq: Your character comes out to the one person whose reaction they can't predict.
A character discovers old letters that reveal a hidden relationship from a previous generation.
Your character moves to a new city and finds community in an unexpected place.
Two characters who were once together meet again years later, both changed.
Your character attends a family event with their partner for the first time.
A character struggles to explain something about themselves that doesn't have easy words.
Your character finds a photo of someone who looks like them from decades ago, living openly.
Two characters fall in love slowly over a series of ordinary moments.
Your character's identity is assumed incorrectly by someone and they have to decide how to respond.
A character writes in their journal about who they're becoming.
Your character has a conversation with a younger person who reminds them of who they used to be.
A small town is changed by the arrival of someone who refuses to hide.
Your character realises they've been performing a version of themselves that isn't real.
Two characters share a moment of understanding without needing to explain.
Your character has to choose between safety and authenticity.
A character finds a space where they belong for the first time.
Your character looks in the mirror and finally recognises the person looking back.
A friendship deepens into something neither character expected.
Your character's parent says something surprisingly accepting and it catches them off guard.
Two characters navigate a world that isn't built for them, together.
mystery: Your character finds a key in a dead person's pocket that doesn't match any lock in their home.
A witness to a crime changes their story and your character wants to know why.
Your character discovers that someone they trusted has been using a false name.
An anonymous tip leads to a location that raises more questions than answers.
Your character notices a pattern in a series of events that everyone else has dismissed as coincidence.
A cold case reopens when new evidence is found in an unlikely place.
Your character receives a warning not to investigate further.
A character's alibi is airtight but something about it doesn't feel right.
Your character finds a hidden compartment in a piece of furniture.
Someone is following your character and making sure they know it.
A victim's last words don't make sense until your character finds the right context.
Your character is hired to find something and discovers the client lied about what it is.
Two suspects have equally compelling motives and your character can only pursue one lead.
A document that should have been destroyed turns up in someone's possession.
Your character realises they've been looking at the crime scene wrong the entire time.
A small detail in a photograph doesn't match the official timeline.
Your character catches someone in a lie but can't prove it yet.
An old diary entry contradicts the accepted version of events.
Your character discovers that the victim was investigating something before they died.
The most obvious suspect is too obvious and your character knows it.
plot: A character discovers they've been betrayed by someone they trusted completely.
Two characters want the same thing but for very different reasons.
A deadline is moved forward and everything has to change.
A secret is revealed at the worst possible time.
Your character is forced to choose between two people they care about.
Something your character has been building towards falls apart.
A character who was an ally becomes an obstacle.
Your character achieves what they wanted and realises it isn't enough.
An unexpected ally appears from the last place anyone would look.
Your character's plan succeeds but with consequences they didn't foresee.
A minor character does something that changes the direction of the story.
Your character is given an ultimatum.
Two storylines that seemed unrelated suddenly collide.
Your character has to sacrifice something personal to protect something bigger.
A promise made early in the story comes due at the worst moment.
Your character learns that the problem they've been solving is not the real problem.
A moment of peace is shattered by unexpected news.
Your character is offered exactly what they want, but the price is someone else's suffering.
A character who left comes back, and their return changes everything.
The rules your character has been playing by suddenly no longer apply.
romance: Your character keeps running into the same person and it's starting to feel like more than coincidence.
Two characters are forced to share a small space for longer than either planned.
Your character receives a love letter that wasn't meant for them.
A character realises they're in love at the most inconvenient possible moment.
Two people who argue about everything discover they agree on the one thing that matters.
Your character's best friend sets them up on a date they didn't ask for.
A chance encounter during a storm leads somewhere neither character expected.
Your character finds out their crush has been leaving anonymous notes for them.
Two characters who met online finally meet in person and it's nothing like they imagined.
Your character helps a stranger and can't stop thinking about them afterwards.
A character says something vulnerable for the first time and the other person stays.
Two characters dance together and the rest of the room disappears.
Your character's ex shows up just as they're starting to move on.
A misunderstanding pushes two characters apart and pride keeps them there.
Your character is about to leave town permanently when someone gives them a reason to stay.
Two rivals slowly realise their arguments have become flirting.
Your character reads an old message from someone they lost touch with and picks up the phone.
A character cooks for someone they care about and puts too much thought into every detail.
Your character kisses someone and immediately panics about what it means.
Two characters who thought they missed their chance get an unexpected second one.
scifi: Your character receives a transmission from a ship that was declared lost decades ago.
A routine system update reveals that the AI has been making decisions it wasn't programmed to make.
Your character wakes from cryosleep and the crew that was supposed to wake them is gone.
A colony planet is thriving but no one can explain why the original settlers disappeared.
Your character discovers that their memories don't match the official records.
A signal is detected from outside the known universe.
Your character's cybernetic implant starts showing them things that aren't there.
A terraforming project uncovers structures that predate human arrival.
Your character is the last person on a space station and something just docked.
Time moves differently in one part of the ship and no one can figure out why.
A cloned character discovers they aren't the original and never were.
Your character must decide whether to make first contact against orders.
A planet's ecosystem is changing faster than any model predicted.
Your character finds a message in their own handwriting that they don't remember writing.
An FTL jump goes wrong and the ship arrives somewhere that shouldn't exist.
Your character's robot companion starts asking questions about death.
A generation ship reaches its destination and the passengers don't want to leave.
Your character discovers that the quarantine isn't keeping something out — it's keeping them in.
An extinct species is found alive on a moon that hasn't been surveyed in centuries.
Your character is offered immortality but the cost isn't what they expected.

A character loses someone.

A character misses something important.

A character passes out.

A crowd has gathered.

Today's headlines make an announcement that is important to your character.
Two characters get into a heated argument about work.
Two things are unexpectedly related.
Your character cracks a bad joke.
Your character goes to the other side of town for a day.
Your character has a skill that has not been mentioned before.
Your character invites someone they don't like over for dinner.
Your character is presented with a meal they don't like.
Your character makes a new friend in an unexpected place.
Your character tries something wild.
Your character turns off the music.
Your characters get dressed up.
supernatural: Your character starts seeing a figure that appears in every reflective surface.
A ouija board session goes differently than anyone expected.
Your character inherits a house and the estate agent won't go inside.
A character discovers they can sense when someone nearby is about to die.
Your character finds a journal belonging to a ghost hunter who disappeared mid-investigation.
The new moon brings something into town that leaves before sunrise.
Your character is contacted by a medium who says a spirit has been asking for them by name.
A cursed object arrives in the post with no return address.
Your character starts dreaming about events before they happen.
A cemetery groundskeeper notices that one grave is never where they left it.
Your character's dead relative leaves them a voicemail.
A building that burned down years ago is visible on foggy nights.
Your character meets someone who claims to have lived multiple lives and remembers all of them.
A child points at empty air and says a name that makes every adult in the room go pale.
Your character finds scratches on the inside of a door that was sealed from the outside.
An exorcism goes wrong and something follows the priest home.
Your character discovers that a local legend is based on real events that are still happening.
A tarot reading gives the same card no matter how many times the deck is shuffled.
Your character wakes up with knowledge they've never learned.
Something that was banished a long time ago has found its way back.
thriller: Your character realises they're being watched through their own security cameras.
A colleague sends your character a file and is found dead the next morning.
Your character discovers that someone has been living in their attic.
A character receives proof that a person in witness protection is not who they claim to be.
Your character finds a phone in a taxi with a single text: don't go home.
A trusted friend asks your character to hold something for them and disappears.
Your character notices the same car has been parked outside their house for three days.
A blackmail letter arrives with information that only one person should know.
Your character wakes up in a hotel room with no memory of checking in and blood on their hands.
A fire destroys the one piece of evidence your character needed.
Your character is told they have 24 hours to find someone before it's too late.
A missing person case takes a turn when the missing person contacts your character.
Your character discovers a hidden camera in their home.
Someone your character put in prison is released and makes contact.
A routine background check reveals that your character's new partner doesn't exist on paper.
Your character intercepts a conversation they were never meant to hear.
A dead drop contains something far more dangerous than information.
Your character's flight is diverted and something is wrong with the other passengers.
A character discovers their therapist has been reporting their sessions to someone.
Your character finds a list of names. Theirs is the last one not crossed out.
